latestPost.text: The enterprise AI story is changing. The first wave was chatbots. The next wave is AI systems that can actually run parts of a business. In our conversation with @Saha_Deban, CEO of @DataRobot, he explains why this shift changes everything, and what companies are getting wrong about enterprise AI. Listen to the latest episode of Nebius for Startups podcast: https://nebius.com/podcast

From open models and developer communities to the infrastructure behind modern AI, they’ll discuss what’s next for the AI ecosystem. See you there! 👀 https://bit.ly/3RNv0XV

latestPost.text: At the recent ribbon cutting for Polaris Forge 1, we had the opportunity to recognize the partners helping turn ambitious plans into operational AI capacity. Building infrastructure at this scale takes more than power and land. It takes coordination across government, construction, operations and technology — and a shared commitment to delivering the right way. Thank you to @GovArmstrong for joining us and for your continued support of innovation and investment in North Dakota. Thank you to Nate Wood and the team at McGough for helping turn vision into reality. Thank you to Mike Jones and Salute for the operational excellence that keeps mission-critical infrastructure running. Thank you to Bret Crossland and @CoreWeave for your partnership and for trusting us to help deliver the cloud platform powering the next generation of AI. AI infrastructure is a team effort. We’re proud of the one behind this campus. $APLD
